accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context (CRA, NPS/Interior, 90 Fed. Reg. 2621, dates).

no_hallucinations.why: Identifying chapter 8 of title 5 as the Congressional Review Act is accurate context, not a fabrication.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves and nullifies the NPS motor vehicles rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly explains the resolution operates under the CRA to void the identified rule, giving it no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: The resolution contains no exceptions, conditions, or carve-outs to note.

effective_dates.why: Accurately reports the House/Senate passage dates and the May 23, 2025 approval date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect—nullification of the rule with no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

concise.why: Appropriately brief with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the National Park Service, Department of the Interior, and the Congressional Review Act.

correct_figures.why: The Federal Register citation (90 Fed. Reg. 2621) and all dates are stated correctly.
